mapper.sql: id, citycode, adcode, `name`, center, `level`, parent_id, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag

mapper.update:
update region
citycode = #{citycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
adcode = #{adcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
center = #{center,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`level` = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update region set citycode = #{citycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adcode = #{adcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, center = #{center,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `level` = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
